name: Cognigy Conversational AI Platform API
what_it_does: Enterprise conversational AI platform with REST API — building and deploying voice and chat virtual agents (IVR, chatbots, agent assist) for contact centers, with low-code visual flow builder, NLU engine, omnichannel deployment (phone, web, WhatsApp, Teams), real-time agent assist, and deep contact center integrations.
use_cases: Building and deploying voice IVR virtual agents via Cognigy for inbound contact center automation
Querying Cognigy analytics (containment rate, conversation metrics) for contact center reporting
Integrating Cognigy agent assist with agent desktop for real-time coaching and knowledge retrieval
Managing Cognigy flow configurations, intents, and entities via REST API
Deploying omnichannel virtual agents across web chat, WhatsApp, and Microsoft Teams
not_for: Simple website chatbots (use Intercom or Tidio for marketing site chat)
E-commerce customer service automation (use Zowie for e-commerce focus)
Small businesses without enterprise contact center (Cognigy serves enterprises 500+ seats)
best_when: An enterprise contact center needs sophisticated voice and chat virtual agents with advanced NLU, contact center integrations (Genesys, Avaya, NICE), and real-time agent assist at scale.
avoid_when: You're an SMB, need a simple FAQ chatbot, don't have a formal contact center operation, or lack dedicated conversational AI engineering resources.

auth.notes: API key from Cognigy management UI. OAuth2 for enterprise SSO integration. Bearer token auth. Organization and project-scoped access. Webhook for conversation events and escalations. Contact center integrations (Genesys, Avaya, NICE, Amazon Connect, Twilio Flex). Cognigy Voice Gateway for telephony. Role-based access control for multi-team deployments.

pricing.notes: German company (Düsseldorf). Founded 2016. Raised $169M+ (Series C, 2022). Backed by DTCP, Summit Partners, Insight Partners. Enterprise conversational AI leader in Europe and expanding in US. On-premises deployment option for high-security environments. 1,000+ enterprise customers including Bosch, Toyota, Lufthansa. Voice and chat unified platform is key differentiator. Gartner Magic Quadrant for Conversational AI leader.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for flows, intents, analytics, agents, and deployments. API key and OAuth2 auth. Excellent enterprise documentation. On-premises deployment option for highest security. Contact center integration configuration in Cognigy admin UI. Webhook for conversation events. SDK available for Node.js and Python.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Analytics reads idempotent. Flow reads idempotent. Flow updates use versioning — use version ID for idempotent updates. Conversation creation not idempotent.
known_agent_gotchas: Low-code flow builder is primary development interface — API manages configuration and monitoring
Voice integration requires Cognigy Voice Gateway or contact center SIP trunking setup
Contact center integrations (Genesys, Avaya) require separate enterprise licenses
On-premises deployment requires Kubernetes infrastructure expertise
Enterprise pricing $100K+/year — requires enterprise contact center scale to justify

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. GDPR, SOC2, ISO27001, HIPAA compliant. EU, US, AU data residency. OAuth2 with scopes. On-premises deployment available for highest security requirements. German company with GDPR-first design. Contact center conversations contain sensitive customer data — implement data retention policies. Role-based access critical for multi-team deployments.
